info.title: Filament DB API
info.description: REST API for managing 3D printing filament profiles, spools, nozzles, printers, bed types, locations, print history, sharing, slicer integrations, and OpenPrintTag imports.

tags.name: Filaments
tags.description: CRUD and bulk operations for filament profiles

tags.name: Bed Types
tags.description: Manage build plate / bed surface definitions

tags.name: PrusaSlicer
tags.description: PrusaSlicer config bundle export and import

tags.name: OpenPrintTag
tags.description: OpenPrintTag community database browser and import

tags.name: Sharing
tags.description: Publish and retrieve shared filament catalogs

get.description: Returns all non-deleted filaments, optionally filtered by type, vendor, or search term.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by filament type (e.g. PLA, PETG)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive regex search on filament name

200.description: Array of filament objects sorted by name

post.description: Create a new filament profile. If parentId is provided, the filament becomes a color variant inheriting settings from its parent.

get.description: Returns a single filament with resolved inherited values (for variants), populated nozzle/printer references, and any child variants.

_inherited.description: List of field names inherited from parent

put.description: Update filament fields. Validates parentId references to prevent circular or nested inheritance.

post.description: Sync a filament preset back from PrusaSlicer. The {id} param can be a URL-encoded preset name or a MongoDB ObjectId. Reverse-maps PrusaSlicer INI keys to structured DB fields. When nozzle_diameter and high_flow are provided, calibration-related keys (extrusion_multiplier, pressure_advance, retract settings) are written to the matching per-nozzle calibration entry.

parameters.name: nozzle_diameter
parameters.description: Active nozzle diameter in mm. When provided, calibration keys are written to the matching per-nozzle calibration entry.

parameters.name: high_flow
parameters.description: Whether the nozzle is high-flow. Disambiguates same-diameter nozzles (e.g. 0.4mm vs 0.4mm HF).

config.description: PrusaSlicer INI key-value pairs to sync back (e.g. filament_type, temperature, bed_temperature)

message.example: Synced 12 settings for "Prusament PLA Galaxy Black"

delete.description: Soft-deletes a filament by setting _deletedAt. Cannot delete a parent that still has variants.

get.description: Generates a CBOR-encoded OpenPrintTag binary for NFC writing. Contains filament name, brand, type, color, density, diameter, and temperatures.

Returns calibration data for a specific filament and nozzle diameter. Looks up the filament by URL-encoded name or ObjectId, resolves variant inheritance, then finds the calibration entry whose nozzle diameter matches the query param. Used by PrusaSlicer to auto-adjust filament settings when the user switches printer presets.

parameters.name: high_flow
parameters.description: Filter by high-flow nozzle flag. Disambiguates same-diameter nozzles (e.g. 0.4mm vs 0.4mm HF).

200.description: Calibration data for the matched nozzle

printer.description: Printer name, or null if calibration is not printer-specific

404.description: Filament not found or no calibration for that nozzle diameter

available.description: List of nozzle diameters that do have calibration data

get.summary: Check spool sufficiency for a print job
get.description: Checks whether any spool of this filament has enough remaining filament (by weight in grams) for a print job. If no spools or no spool weight data exists, returns ok: true (no data = no warning). Used by PrusaSlicer to warn after slicing if insufficient filament.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Estimated filament weight in grams for the print job

ok.description: True if at least one spool has enough remaining filament

requiredLengthM.description: Required length in meters (null if density/diameter unavailable)

warning.description: Human-readable warning when ok is false

get.description: Exports all filaments as a PrusaSlicer-compatible INI config bundle. Generates one [filament:Name] section per filament with base settings; nozzle-specific calibration data is applied dynamically by PrusaSlicer via the per-filament calibration endpoint.

schema.example:
# PrusaSlicer config bundle generated by Filament DB

[filament:Prusament PLA]
extrusion_multiplier = 0.95

post.description: Imports filament profiles from an uploaded INI file. Creates new filaments or updates existing ones matched by name.

400.description: No file provided or no profiles found

post.description: Connect to a remote MongoDB Atlas instance to list or import filaments. Send only `uri` to list available filaments; send `uri` + `filamentIds` to import selected ones.

filamentIds.description: IDs of filaments to import. Omit to list all available filaments.

200.description: List of remote filaments (no filamentIds) or import result (with filamentIds)

get.description: Finds the best-matching filament by exact name, vendor+type, or vendor-only. Returns a primary match and up to 5 candidates.
Returns filaments that can be used as parents for color variants (those without a parentId themselves).

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Filament ID to exclude (e.g. when editing)

200.description: Array of parent filaments (name, vendor, type, color)

post.description: Parses an uploaded INI file and returns the extracted filament profiles without saving them to the database.

400.description: No file or no profiles found

get.description: Returns all distinct filament type values (e.g. PLA, PETG, ABS).
Returns all distinct vendor names.
Returns all non-deleted nozzles, optionally filtered by diameter, type, or high-flow flag.

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.description: Filter by nozzle diameter in mm

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by nozzle type (e.g. Brass, Hardened Steel)

200.description: Array of nozzles sorted by diameter then type

delete.description: Soft-deletes a nozzle. Blocked if any filament references it in compatibleNozzles or calibrations.

get.description: Returns all non-deleted printers with populated installed nozzles.

200.description: Array of printers sorted by manufacturer then name

delete.description: Soft-deletes a printer. Blocked if any filament calibration references it.

400.description: Cannot delete — referenced by filament calibrations

label.description: Spool label (e.g. spool ID or date)

get.description: Downloads all filaments as a CSV file with columns for name, vendor, type, color, temperatures, cost, density, weights, instance ID, drying settings, and transmission distance.
Downloads all filaments as a styled XLSX spreadsheet with auto-filter, frozen header, color-coded cells.

post.description: Upload a CSV file with header row. Requires Name, Vendor, Type columns. Only fields present are updated.
Upload an XLSX file with header row. Same column mapping as CSV import.

get.description: Fetches a Prusament spool detail page and extracts specifications (material, color, temperatures, weights, pricing).

parameters.name: spoolId
parameters.description: Prusament spool ID (e.g. c6974284da) or full URL

post.description: Creates a filament from scraped Prusament data or adds a spool to an existing filament.

action.description: Create new filament or add spool to existing

get.description: Aggregates print history and direct manual spool usage for a time window.
Returns counts, inventory totals, low-stock rows, dry-cycle reminders, and recent print history for the dashboard.

get.summary: Check whether a URL can be embedded
get.description: Fetches headers for a public http(s) URL using SSRF-safe redirect handling and reports whether the URL is likely embeddable in an iframe.

400.description: Invalid JSON or duplicate bed type

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the bed type

delete.description: Soft-deletes a bed type unless it is referenced by any filament calibration.

parameters.name: stats
parameters.description: When true, include spool counts and grams per location

delete.description: Soft-deletes a location unless it is referenced by any spool.

get.description: Fetches up to 8 filaments, preserving the order of the comma-separated ids query.
Exports resolved filament profiles as OrcaSlicer-compatible JSON.

post.description: Maps known OrcaSlicer fields back to structured filament fields and stores unknown keys in the settings bag.
Decrements the target spool total weight and appends a manual usage history entry.
Appends a drying-cycle entry to a spool.

parameters.name: filamentId
parameters.description: Filter to jobs using a filament

post.description: Creates a PrintHistory row, debits referenced spools, and stamps usageHistory entries with the job id for safe undo.

delete.description: Refunds matching spool usage and soft-deletes the PrintHistory row so sync propagates the delete tombstone.

404.description: Print history not found or already deleted

post.description: Publishes a static denormalized catalog payload for selected filaments and referenced nozzles/printers/bed types.

get.description: Returns the denormalized payload for a public shared catalog and increments its view count.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the shared catalog so peer sync propagates the unpublish tombstone.

get.description: Exports one row per spool with round-trippable columns for filament, vendor, label, total weight, lot number, dates, and location.

post.description: Bulk-creates spools from CSV. Required columns are filament and totalWeight; vendor can disambiguate, and location names are created when missing.

get.description: Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 document, with version injected from package.json at runtime.
Downloads a JSON snapshot of core app data: filaments, nozzles, printers, bed types, locations, and print history. Shared catalog records are not included in snapshot export/restore.

post.description: Restores snapshot-scoped data from a snapshot using best-effort rollback. If any part of the restore fails, the handler attempts to re-insert previous data from an in-memory backup. Concurrent restores are rejected with 409. Note: the restore is not truly atomic — concurrent readers may observe partial state during the delete/insert window, and rollback itself may fail.

delete.description: Permanently deletes filaments, nozzles, printers, bed types, locations, print history, and shared catalogs.

get.description: Exports filaments as a PrusaSlicer-compatible INI config bundle with one section per filament. Structured DB fields are mapped to PrusaSlicer INI keys and merged with the settings passthrough bag. Calibration overrides are applied dynamically via GET /api/filaments/{id}/calibration.

post.description: Imports a PrusaSlicer INI config bundle. Send raw INI text as the request body.

400.description: Empty body or no sections found

get.description: Fetches the OpenPrintTag community database from GitHub, parses material YAML files, filters to FFF filaments, and returns them with completeness scores. Cached for 1 hour.

post.description: Import selected OpenPrintTag materials into Filament DB. Materials are upserted by name (not name+vendor). If a filament with the same name exists under a different vendor, the import is skipped with an error.

400.description: Missing slugs or database not loaded

get.description: Returns whether an AI API key is configured and which provider is active.

put.description: Save and validate an AI API key for TDS extraction.

delete.description: Removes the stored API key and resets provider to default.

post.description: Extract filament properties from a Technical Data Sheet URL or uploaded file using AI.
Tests connectivity to a MongoDB URI. Used during initial setup to validate the connection string.

totalWeight.description: Current total weight (spool + filament) in grams

minPrintSpeed.description: Minimum recommended print speed in mm/s

maxPrintSpeed.description: Maximum recommended print speed in mm/s

spoolType.description: Spool form factor (e.g. Standard, Refill, Cardboard)

syncId.description: External sync identifier (e.g. PrusaSlicer preset name)

bedType.description: Bed surface type (e.g. Textured PEI, Cool Plate, Engineering Plate)

soluble.description: Whether the filament is soluble (support material)

inherits.description: Name of the slicer base profile this inherits from

parentId.description: Parent filament ID for color variants

settings.description: Raw slicer key-value settings (e.g. extrusion_multiplier, start_filament_gcode)
